app.summaryPromptIntro: An Ontology was just generated from the conversation.
app.summaryPromptInstruction: Summarize the business meaning and coverage in 2-3 sentences, then give 1-2 improvement suggestions. Keep it concise, no headings.

quickStart.heroSubtitle: Transform your business logic into AI-powered operational systems using the Ontology-First methodology
quickStart.ontologyDesc: An Ontology is a structured representation of your business domain - the core entities (Objects), their relationships (Links), and the operations (Actions) that drive your business. It's the foundation for building intelligent systems that truly understand your business.
quickStart.conceptObjectDesc: Business entities like Customer, Order, Product
quickStart.conceptActionDesc: Operations like Create Order, Approve Request
quickStart.phase1Desc: Chat with AI to explore your business requirements and extract key entities
quickStart.phase2Desc: Structure your Objects, define Properties and design Actions
quickStart.phase3Desc: Connect data sources and plan system integrations
quickStart.phase4Desc: Identify AI opportunities and design intelligent automations
quickStart.step1Desc: Start fresh or use an industry template
quickStart.step2Desc: Chat with AI to extract your business logic
quickStart.ctaTitle: Ready to Build Your Intelligent System?
quickStart.tip1: Start with 3-5 core Objects that represent your main business entities
quickStart.tip2: Focus on decision-making: What decisions do users need to make?
quickStart.tip3: Use industry templates as inspiration, then customize for your needs
